summary: Smart Farmer Guide - A mobile-friendly web app for Indian farmers with crop schedules, fertilizer calculator, pest management, weather advisory, market prices, and government schemes. Built as a progressive web app using React and Motoko on the Internet Computer.
architectural_notes: Progressive web app (PWA) optimized for mobile browsers on Android devices
React frontend with mobile-first responsive design
Motoko backend on Internet Computer for future online features
Large touch-friendly UI elements (buttons, fonts) for rural users
Green/earthy color theme throughout the application
Icon-based navigation for intuitive user experience
Static data stored in frontend for offline functionality
Prepared for future localization (Hindi/Marathi translation support)
No authentication required - direct access to all features
known_issues: Platform mismatch: User requested Flutter/Android app but system builds React web apps
Offline-first requirement needs service worker implementation for PWA
Static data approach means market prices and schemes need manual updates
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- App logo for Smart Farmer Guide with farming/agricultural theme, green tones (logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Large icon for Crop Schedule feature showing calendar or planting imagery (icon-crop-schedule.dim_128x128.png)
- Large icon for Fertilizer Calculator showing fertilizer bag or chemical symbol (icon-fertilizer.dim_128x128.png)
- Large icon for Pest & Disease showing insect or plant disease imagery (icon-pest-disease.dim_128x128.png)
- Large icon for Weather Advisory showing sun, cloud, or rain symbols (icon-weather.dim_128x128.png)
- Large icon for Market Prices showing rupee symbol or market stand (icon-market-prices.dim_128x128.png)
- Large icon for Government Schemes showing government building or document (icon-gov-schemes.dim_128x128.png)
- Placeholder image for cotton pest example (pest-cotton.dim_256x256.png)
- Placeholder image for soybean disease example (disease-soybean.dim_256x256.png)
- Placeholder image for wheat pest example (pest-wheat.dim_256x256.png)
- Placeholder image for rice disease example (disease-rice.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a splash screen displaying the app logo and app name 'Smart Farmer Guide' with a smooth transition to the home screen after 2 seconds

Create a home dashboard screen with a grid layout of 6 large, icon-based navigation cards: Crop Schedule, Fertilizer Calculator, Pest & Disease, Weather Advisory, Market Prices, and Government Schemes. Each card must have large, clear icons and text suitable for first-time smartphone users.

Create a Crop Schedule screen with a dropdown to select crop (Cotton, Soybean, Wheat, Rice) and display a step-by-step timeline showing sowing, fertilizer stages, irrigation, and harvest phases for the selected crop using cards or timeline UI

Create a Fertilizer Dose Calculator screen with input fields for crop name (dropdown) and land area in acres (number input), and calculate fertilizer quantities (Urea, DAP, etc.) using local logic. Display results instantly below the inputs.

Create a Pest & Disease Management screen showing crop-wise lists of common pests and diseases. Each entry must display pest/disease name, symptoms, control method, and chemical name with dosage. Use placeholder images and simple, farmer-friendly text.

Create a Weather Advisory screen with simulated weather options (Sunny, Rainy, Cloudy) that can be selected by the user, and display farming advisory messages based on the selected condition (e.g., 'Do not spray during rain', 'Irrigation recommended')

Create a Market Prices screen displaying a static list of crop prices in APMC style format showing crop name and price per quintal. Make the data easy to update by storing it in a simple, well-documented format.
Create a Government Schemes screen listing major schemes (crop insurance, fertilizer subsidy, irrigation subsidy) with details about eligibility criteria and benefits for each scheme

Implement a mobile-first responsive design with green and earthy color theme throughout the app. Use large buttons, large fonts, icon-based navigation, and ensure the layout is extremely simple and suitable for first-time smartphone users on low-end Android devices.
Structure the codebase to support easy future translation to Hindi and Marathi by isolating all user-facing text strings in a centralized location with clear comments indicating translation points

Implement progressive web app (PWA) functionality with a service worker to enable offline access to all static data including crop schedules, fertilizer calculations, pest management information, weather advisories, market prices, and government schemes

Apply a creative, cohesive visual design theme with an earthy, agricultural aesthetic that uses greens, browns, and warm earth tones. The design should feel trustworthy and approachable for rural farmers, with nature-inspired elements that reinforce the farming context throughout the interface.

new_feature_requests.summary: Home dashboard with 6 feature cards (Crop Schedule, Fertilizer Calculator, Pest & Disease, Weather Advisory, Market Prices, Government Schemes)
Crop schedule screen showing step-by-step timeline for Cotton, Soybean, Wheat, Rice (sowing, fertilizer stages, irrigation, harvest)
Fertilizer dose calculator with crop name and land area inputs, showing fertilizer type and quantity
Pest & disease management screen with crop-wise lists showing symptoms, control methods, and chemical dosages
Weather advisory screen with simulated weather options and farming recommendations
Market prices screen showing static APMC-style crop prices per quintal
Government schemes screen listing crop insurance, fertilizer subsidy, irrigation subsidy with eligibility and benefits
